tasks.subject: Task 1: Narrow BROWSER_KILL_PATTERN to match exec paths only
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Fix Camoufox self-kill regression by prepending `/` to each engine name in BROWSER_KILL_PATTERN. Update 2 existing tests + add 2 regression tests.

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/browserKill.ts`
- Modify: `apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/tests/browserKill.test.ts`

**Verify:** `cd apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler && npm test && npm run build`

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/browserKill.ts","apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/tests/browserKill.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler && npm test && npm run build","acceptanceCriteria":["pattern starts each engine with /","2 existing tests updated","2 regression tests added (argv guard + exec path coverage)","full suite green","build clean"]}
```
